The '''Halcyon''' was a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] [[Booster/Legends|booster]] manufactured by [[Quadex/Legends|Qualdex]]. During the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]], it was regarded as one of the most powerful boosters from this company.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Jump to Lightspeed]]'' {{1st}}
